title: Trisetum tenellum
taxonomy: Trisetum tenellum is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Trisetum, which is a group of grasses commonly known as 'palm-grasses'. Trisetum tenellum is further classified as part of the subfamily Pooideae, a large and diverse group within the Poaceae family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species. Trisetum tenellum is also known to be native to the western United States.
